fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. ticket-system.instructions.md updated to require every ticket must pass through in-review before done. 2. Instructions enforce progressing through every applicable state (no skipping). 3. Instructions document the undo/revert workflow for correcting premature state transitions. 4. Instructions document per-ticket required_states field usage. 5. next command documentation updated to reflect progress-based sorting.
fields.title: [ticket-system] Instruction updates: mandatory review gate and diligent state progression
